Bash("c:\\Users\\Eric Fredericksen\\source\\repos\\AI-Agentic-Architecture\\Demo\\frontend\\.eslintrc.cjs" << 'EOF'
module.exports = {
  root: true,
  env: { browser: true, es2020: true },
  extends: [
    'eslint:recommended',
    'plugin:@typescript-eslint/recommended',
    'plugin:react-hooks/recommended',
  ],
  ignorePatterns: ['dist', '.eslintrc.cjs'],
  parser: '@typescript-eslint/parser',
  plugins: ['react-refresh'],
  rules: {
    'react-refresh/only-export-components': [
      'warn',
      { allowConstantExport: true },
    ],
    '@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any': 'off',
  },
}
EOF)

Bash(docker exec dbintel-postgres psql -U dbintel_user -d dbintel -c "SELECT connection_id, COUNT\(*\) as chunk_count FROM schema_chunks GROUP BY connection_id;")

Bash(docker exec dbintel-postgres psql -U postgres -d dbintel -c "SELECT connection_id, COUNT\(*\) as chunk_count, AVG\(LENGTH\(content\)\) as avg_content_length FROM schema_chunks GROUP BY connection_id;")
